name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: This is serious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

It may be the biggest blow ever taken against America's growing surveillance state.

My ten-and-a-half-hour filibuster against renewal of the so-called "PATRIOT Act's" worst spying provisions has thrown Washington, D.C. into turmoil.

As I write you, it's not clear the path NSA apologists will choose to take next. All that's clear is that, against all odds, you and I have won "Round 1."

But the stakes get even higher from here, and time is running out.

That's why I'm announcing an emergency 48 hour "NSA Spying Showdown" Money Bomb.

I've been called out by the Obama administration as Enemy #1 and with the Senate set for a special session on Sunday I only have until tomorrow to rally patriots to stand with me against President Obama's illegal NSA spying.

Fellow Conservative, Americans from all over the country are rising up to "Stand With Rand" and join the fight to restore our Bill of Rights.

**[Can I count on you to join me before the deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28071762:26970738527:m:1:879035888:DCEC5CDEDB0590FD995CDC6C5F5FC8F0:r)**?

I believe the grassroots army willing to "take our country back," as I envisioned in my announcement speech, is forming before our eyes. Polls are proving it.

But I know you have the ability to make a big impact with your generosity.

So today, with the Senate down to just eight hours on May 31st to RAM an extension into law, I'm writing to ask for your support for my emergency "NSA Spying Showdown" Money Bomb.

The truth is, you and I weren't supposed to be here.

With Section 215 of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" set to expire on May 31st - the section of federal law some wrongly say authorizes NSA spying - those who back the NSA's unconstitutional bulk collection of Americans' metadata wanted the Senate to roll over, reauthorize and extend the scheme.

It's no accident that the Senate was set to consider the so-called "PATRIOT Act" right before the Memorial Day holiday weekend.

Most Americans wouldn't be paying attention, and Senators would be anxious to get out of town for the planned week-long recess.

Even after the FBI admitted the NSA's programs helped them crack exactly zero terrorist plots, backers of the NSA's spying schemes continued to claim reauthorization of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" is a matter of grave national importance.

And despite the recent 2nd U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals' decision that the NSA's spying program was illegal, my colleagues wanted virtually zero debate or amendments.

Only in Washington, D.C. do illegal government schemes involving matters of "grave importance" deserve so little consideration!

Of course, this is all business-as-usual in Washington, D.C.

The flippant attitude toward our Bill of Rights.

The attempted last-minute railroading of legislation my colleagues know the American people oppose.

The Washington Machine trying to figure out how to sweep government agencies' lawlessness under the rug.

The reason I decided to run for President was to stop all of this madness. I've even pledged to end NSA spying on day one in the Oval Office.

So I decided I simply must take a stand.

On Wednesday, May 20th, around 1:15 in the afternoon, I took to the U.S. Senate's floor stating: "There comes to a time in the history of nations when fear and complacency allow power to accumulate and Liberty and privacy to suffer.

That time is now.

And I will not let the PATRIOT Act, the most un-Patriotic of acts, go unchallenged."

**[So I hope you will join me in fighting to stop illegal domestic spying by chipping in a contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28071762:26970738527:m:1:879035888:DCEC5CDEDB0590FD995CDC6C5F5FC8F0:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, my intention from the very beginning was to hold the floor as long as I could.

One lesson I learned from my 2013 filibuster to force the Obama administration to admit it had no authority to drone American citizens on American soil was to wear more comfortable shoes!

But I found out that shoes only do so much good.

Senators who are holding the floor can't go to the bathroom or even sit down during a filibuster. So even with an aching throat from so much speaking.

I had to be extremely careful not to drink too much water.

Thankfully, ten of my Senate colleagues came to the floor to spell me with questions.

As the hours pressed on, I became even more tired and sore - ultimately resorting to propping myself up with my desk to try and stop the throbbing pain in my back, feet and legs.

At 11:49 PM, I walked off of the floor. I was utterly exhausted - but excited at the same time.

I knew the NSA spying provisions my colleagues hoped to ram through the Senate and extend for years on end with little public fanfare had suddenly been thrust to the forefront of the American political debate - right where I wanted it.

My staff and I spent Thursday crafting a series of amendments to the "PATRIOT Act" to end all bulk collection of American's phone data and remove immunity from third party data holders who share Americans' private information with government agencies.

And as Friday evening turned into Saturday morning, the U.S. Senate went to work on the so-called "PATRIOT Act."

But around 12:40 AM, the U.S. Senate voted down the USA Freedom Act - the House's misguided "reform" bill, which still provides for bulk collection of Americans' records and warrantless searches.

And every attempt to extend Section 215 of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" - from two months to two days - was defeated.

Before my filibuster, extension of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" was supposed to be a foregone conclusion. But now Politico says the "PATRIOT Act" is on "life support."

News reports claim the NSA is already taking steps to begin winding down their phone data collection programs.

When the Senate comes back into session on May 31st, there will be just eight hours for spy state apologists to reach a deal to keep these programs going. Eight hours!

I'm determined to do whatever I can to stop them - regardless of the ugly smears I face by both the press and surveillance state backers. Already, those attacks are coming hotter than ever.

In fact, the establishment's pick for President, who has called the NSA's illegal spying programs "the best part of the Obama administration," attacked me.

The senior Senator from Arizona even dared suggest my efforts were a campaign stunt!

They don't get it. They don't get the fact the American people are fed up and angry with politics-as-usual on everything from ObamaCare to spending to spying.

In Washington, D.C., freedom is sometimes viewed as a dirty word. But outside the Beltway, the American people still care about the Bill of Rights.

I care too. Immensely. After all, what's to become of our great nation if we simply throw up our hands, admit defeat and decide freedom no longer works?

Freedom does work. And the American people can have both their Liberty and security.

**[If you agree, I hope you'll chip in a contribution of $20.16 to my campaign today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28071762:26970738527:m:1:879035888:DCEC5CDEDB0590FD995CDC6C5F5FC8F0:r)**.

Defeating the Washington Machine and restoring the Founders' vision for our country is the core message of my presidential campaign. Ending NSA spying is an integral part.

This message is resonating among Americans of all backgrounds.

In fact, recent polls have me defeating Hillary Clinton in key swing states like Colorado, Iowa, New Hampshire, and Pennsylvania. One member of the media even called me "Hillary Clinton's Kryptonite!"

The fight to stop NSA data collection is not over. But I've proven that one man who is willing to take a stand and fight for the American people can make a difference.

Fellow Conservative, I'm going to continue to stand and fight. When the Senate goes back into session on May 31st, there will be only eight hours left.

It would mean the world to me to have your emergency support today.

I know you can make a big impact with your generosity. **[So please act right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28071762:26970738527:m:1:879035888:DCEC5CDEDB0590FD995CDC6C5F5FC8F0:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28071763:26970738527:m:1:879035888:DCEC5CDEDB0590FD995CDC6C5F5FC8F0:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28071764:26970738527:m:1:879035888:DCEC5CDEDB0590FD995CDC6C5F5FC8F0:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28071765:26970738527:m:1:879035888:DCEC5CDEDB0590FD995CDC6C5F5FC8F0:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28071766:26970738527:m:1:879035888:DCEC5CDEDB0590FD995CDC6C5F5FC8F0:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28071762:26970738527:m:1:879035888:DCEC5CDEDB0590FD995CDC6C5F5FC8F0:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul
U.S. Senator (R-KY)

P.S.The fight against NSA data collection rages on. You and I have already won a major victory. But the stakes get higher from here.

Your support today would mean the world to me. **[Please chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28071762:26970738527:m:1:879035888:DCEC5CDEDB0590FD995CDC6C5F5FC8F0:r)**.

I believe we can have both Liberty and security in America - if Patriots like you will join me in fighting back.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28071762:26970738527:m:1:879035888:DCEC5CDEDB0590FD995CDC6C5F5FC8F0:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28071767:26970738527:m:1:879035888:DCEC5CDEDB0590FD995CDC6C5F5FC8F0:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28071768:26970738527:m:1:879035888:DCEC5CDEDB0590FD995CDC6C5F5FC8F0:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28071769:26970738527:m:1:879035888:DCEC5CDEDB0590FD995CDC6C5F5FC8F0:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWZd3XW1Nn). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWZd3XW1Nn)

name: alexandraforrand2016@gmail.com
subject: FW: Please contact Fellow Conservative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Rand asked me to reach out to you.

The deadline for the emergency "NSA Spying Showdown" Money Bomb is tomorrow night and he isn't sure if you are with him.

He stood on the Senate floor for 10.5 hours to try and block spy state apologists from racing a renewal of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" and illegal domestic spying through Congress ahead of a holiday weekend.

That was a huge win but it was only the first stage of this fight.

When the Senate comes into session on Sunday there will be just 8 hours on the clock to try and pass legislation extending the so-called "PATRIOT Act" and illegal bulk data collection.

And now the Obama administration is calling Rand out as "Enemy #1" because he won't back down in defense of our liberties.

This is a fight our movement can win but it's going to require true patriots across America to Stand with Rand.

Our records show you haven't made a contribution, **[so please Stand with Rand by chipping in a contribution of $20.16 before tomorrow's deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28083343:26985669869:m:1:879035888:EA8C2557A18D7C7B127D0BD646F1D64E:r)**.

| ****[** dpwillis67@gmail.com **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28083343:26985669869:m:1:879035888:EA8C2557A18D7C7B127D0BD646F1D64E:r "https://secure.randpaul.com/?patriotact&sr=rhf052915t1")
**Contributed to NSA Spying Showdown Money Bomb?**
**## NO DONATION ##******
---

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28083344:26985669869:m:1:879035888:EA8C2557A18D7C7B127D0BD646F1D64E:r)
---

[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28083346:26985669869:m:1:879035888:EA8C2557A18D7C7B127D0BD646F1D64E:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28083347:26985669869:m:1:879035888:EA8C2557A18D7C7B127D0BD646F1D64E:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28083343:26985669869:m:1:879035888:EA8C2557A18D7C7B127D0BD646F1D64E:r)

\-- Alexandra

* * *

**From** : Rand Paul [Rand.Paul@randpaul2016.com]
**Sent** : Friday, May 29th, 1:58 PM
**Subject** : Please contact Fellow Conservative

Alexandra --

The Senate comes back for a special Sunday session and I haven't heard if Fellow Conservative will stand with me against President Obama's illegal NSA bulk data collection program.

The Obama administration has called me out because I'm leading the fight to end warrantless spying on Americans.

Please do me a favor and send Fellow Conservative an email as soon as you can.

The deadline for my "NSA Spying Showdown" Money Bomb is tomorrow.

And I'm counting on Fellow Conservative's help immediately.

Stopping spy state apologists from passing a bill to renew the so-called "PATRIOT Act" would be a HUGE first step toward ending illegal domestic spying.

Please let Fellow Conservative know how important this fight is.

Thanks,

Rand

_Sent from my iPad_

clean_body: Fellow Conservative, Rand asked me to reach out to you. The deadline for the emergency "NSA Spying Showdown" Money Bomb is tomorrow night and he isn't sure if you are with him. He stood on the Senate floor for 10.5 hours to try and block spy state apologists from racing a renewal of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" and illegal domestic spying through Congress ahead of a holiday weekend. That was a huge win but it was only the first stage of this fight. When the Senate comes into session on Sunday there will be just 8 hours on the clock to try and pass legislation extending the so-called "PATRIOT Act" and illegal bulk data collection. And now the Obama administration is calling Rand out as "Enemy #1" because he won't back down in defense of our liberties. This is a fight our movement can win but it's going to require true patriots across America to Stand with Rand. Our records show you haven't made a contribution, . | ** "" Contributed to NSA Spying Showdown Money Bomb? NO DONATION ##**** | \-- Alexandra From : Rand Paul [Rand.Paul@randpaul2016.com] Sent : Friday, May 29th, 1:58 PM Subject : Please contact Fellow Conservative Alexandra -- The Senate comes back for a special Sunday session and I haven't heard if Fellow Conservative will stand with me against President Obama's illegal NSA bulk data collection program. The Obama administration has called me out because I'm leading the fight to end warrantless spying on Americans. Please do me a favor and send Fellow Conservative an email as soon as you can. The deadline for my "NSA Spying Showdown" Money Bomb is tomorrow. And I'm counting on Fellow Conservative's help immediately. Stopping spy state apologists from passing a bill to renew the so-called "PATRIOT Act" would be a HUGE first step toward ending illegal domestic spying. Please let Fellow Conservative know how important this fight is. Thanks, Rand Sent from my iPad From : Rand Paul [Rand.Paul@randpaul2016.com] To : Fellow Conservative [dpwillis67@gmail.com] Subject : This is serious Dear Fellow Conservative: It may be the biggest blow ever taken against America's growing surveillance state. My ten-and-a-half-hour filibuster against renewal of the so-called "PATRIOT Act's" worst spying provisions has thrown Washington, D.C. into turmoil. As I write you, it's not clear the path NSA apologists will choose to take next. All that's clear is that, against all odds, you and I have won "Round 1." But the stakes get even higher from here, and time is running out. That's why I'm announcing an emergency 48 hour "NSA Spying Showdown" Money Bomb. I've been called out by the Obama administration as Enemy #1 and with the Senate set for a special session on Sunday I only have until tomorrow to rally patriots to stand with me against President Obama's illegal NSA spying. Fellow Conservative, Americans from all over the country are rising up to "Stand With Rand" and join the fight to restore our Bill of Rights. ? I believe the grassroots army willing to "take our country back," as I envisioned in my announcement speech, is forming before our eyes. Polls are proving it. But I know you have the ability to make a big impact with your generosity. So today, with the Senate down to just eight hours on May 31st to RAM an extension into law, I'm writing to ask for your support for my emergency "NSA Spying Showdown" Money Bomb. The truth is, you and I weren't supposed to be here. With Section 215 of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" set to expire on May 31st - the section of federal law some wrongly say authorizes NSA spying - those who back the NSA's unconstitutional bulk collection of Americans' metadata wanted the Senate to roll over, reauthorize and extend the scheme. It's no accident that the Senate was set to consider the so-called "PATRIOT Act" right before the Memorial Day holiday weekend. Most Americans wouldn't be paying attention, and Senators would be anxious to get out of town for the planned week-long recess. Even after the FBI admitted the NSA's programs helped them crack exactly zero terrorist plots, backers of the NSA's spying schemes continued to claim reauthorization of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" is a matter of grave national importance. And despite the recent 2nd U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals' decision that the NSA's spying program was illegal, my colleagues wanted virtually zero debate or amendments. Only in Washington, D.C. do illegal government schemes involving matters of "grave importance" deserve so little consideration! Of course, this is all business-as-usual in Washington, D.C. The flippant attitude toward our Bill of Rights. The attempted last-minute railroading of legislation my colleagues know the American people oppose. The Washington Machine trying to figure out how to sweep government agencies' lawlessness under the rug. The reason I decided to run for President was to stop all of this madness. I've even pledged to end NSA spying on day one in the Oval Office. So I decided I simply must take a stand. On Wednesday, May 20th, around 1:15 in the afternoon, I took to the U.S. Senate's floor stating: "There comes to a time in the history of nations when fear and complacency allow power to accumulate and Liberty and privacy to suffer. That time is now. And I will not let the PATRIOT Act, the most un-Patriotic of acts, go unchallenged." . Fellow Conservative, my intention from the very beginning was to hold the floor as long as I could. One lesson I learned from my 2013 filibuster to force the Obama administration to admit it had no authority to drone American citizens on American soil was to wear more comfortable shoes! But I found out that shoes only do so much good. Senators who are holding the floor can't go to the bathroom or even sit down during a filibuster. So even with an aching throat from so much speaking. I had to be extremely careful not to drink too much water. Thankfully, ten of my Senate colleagues came to the floor to spell me with questions. As the hours pressed on, I became even more tired and sore - ultimately resorting to propping myself up with my desk to try and stop the throbbing pain in my back, feet and legs. At 11:49 PM, I walked off of the floor. I was utterly exhausted - but excited at the same time. I knew the NSA spying provisions my colleagues hoped to ram through the Senate and extend for years on end with little public fanfare had suddenly been thrust to the forefront of the American political debate - right where I wanted it. My staff and I spent Thursday crafting a series of amendments to the "PATRIOT Act" to end all bulk collection of American's phone data and remove immunity from third party data holders who share Americans' private information with government agencies. And as Friday evening turned into Saturday morning, the U.S. Senate went to work on the so-called "PATRIOT Act." But around 12:40 AM, the U.S. Senate voted down the USA Freedom Act - the House's misguided "reform" bill, which still provides for bulk collection of Americans' records and warrantless searches. And every attempt to extend Section 215 of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" - from two months to two days - was defeated. Before my filibuster, extension of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" was supposed to be a foregone conclusion. But now Politico says the "PATRIOT Act" is on "life support." News reports claim the NSA is already taking steps to begin winding down their phone data collection programs. When the Senate comes back into session on May 31st, there will be just eight hours for spy state apologists to reach a deal to keep these programs going. Eight hours! I'm determined to do whatever I can to stop them - regardless of the ugly smears I face by both the press and surveillance state backers. Already, those attacks are coming hotter than ever. In fact, the establishment's pick for President, who has called the NSA's illegal spying programs "the best part of the Obama administration," attacked me. The senior Senator from Arizona even dared suggest my efforts were a campaign stunt! They don't get it. They don't get the fact the American people are fed up and angry with politics-as-usual on everything from ObamaCare to spending to spying. In Washington, D.C., freedom is sometimes viewed as a dirty word. But outside the Beltway, the American people still care about the Bill of Rights. I care too. Immensely. After all, what's to become of our great nation if we simply throw up our hands, admit defeat and decide freedom no longer works? Freedom does work. And the American people can have both their Liberty and security. . Defeating the Washington Machine and restoring the Founders' vision for our country is the core message of my presidential campaign. Ending NSA spying is an integral part. This message is resonating among Americans of all backgrounds. In fact, recent polls have me defeating Hillary Clinton in key swing states like Colorado, Iowa, New Hampshire, and Pennsylvania. One member of the media even called me "Hillary Clinton's Kryptonite!" The fight to stop NSA data collection is not over. But I've proven that one man who is willing to take a stand and fight for the American people can make a difference. Fellow Conservative, I'm going to continue to stand and fight. When the Senate goes back into session on May 31st, there will be only eight hours left. It would mean the world to me to have your emergency support today. I know you can make a big impact with your generosity. . | In Liberty, Rand Paul U.S. Senator (R-KY) P.S.The fight against NSA data collection rages on. You and I have already won a major victory. But the stakes get higher from here. Your support today would mean the world to me. . I believe we can have both Liberty and security in America - if Patriots like you will join me in fighting back. Paid for by Rand Paul for President This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 16, 2015. For more information . | mailto:unsub-26985669869-echo3-FA8657D38EBDB69729B7964A2D4F3B40@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: Rand Paul
subject: All bets are off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

While many Americans are gearing up for another early-summer weekend, I'm gearing up for an all-out fight Sunday afternoon.

When you and I won our stunning victory last week -- defeating every attempt to extend or reauthorize the worst of the so-called "PATRIOT Act's" ILLEGAL spying provisions -- that was just the beginning.

Since then, I've been attacked viciously by the Obama White House -- the same President who ran for office pledging to end these spying schemes as part of the "hope" and "change" he was offering the American people -- for daring to stand up for the Constitution I swore to uphold as a U.S. Senator.

That's business-as-usual for the Washington Machine: Campaign on nothing but lies -- and then deliver the American people the status-quo.

Fellow Conservative, if you want a new direction in Washington, I must be able to count on your IMMEDIATE action.

With only about 36 hours left, time is running out. **[So please chip in $20.16 to my campaign's"NSA Spying Showdown" Money Bomb right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28088229:26994663380:m:1:879035888:F6897D96BF0D7D4BCF9E53068589B23A:r)**, and then forward this email to everyone you know.

Our Founders were willing to give up everything to ensure Americans' God-given rights were protected -- ultimately drawing a line in the sand AGAINST any government encroachment on our freedoms with the Bill of Rights.

Today, the Bill of Rights is under assault like never before by members of BOTH parties. And the Fourth Amendment right to privacy against government intrusion is at the top of their list.

Instead of hauling in the NSA lawbreakers who crafted these ILLEGAL domestic spying programs -- and then lied about it before Congress -- my colleagues in the Senate are now looking for ways to excuse and extend the schemes.

They tell you and me we have to give up every bit of our Liberty for security -- while ignoring the fact the FBI admitted this program has cracked exactly ZERO terrorist plots!

Fellow Conservative, you and I don't have to give up one ounce of our Liberty for security.

But it's up to you and me to ensure our government spends its time targeting those who are truly dangerous -- instead of fumbling through law-abiding American citizens' phone records.

This is not a fight you and I can ignore.

It strikes to the very heart of what it means to be an American.

Fellow Conservative, I believe free people can best live their lives out from under the control or watchful eye of government bureaucrats.

But the Washington Machine believes security can only be had in the arms of Big Brother.

If the American people buy this lie, I fear our fragile Republic may not long survive.

We must fight back.

**[Please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to my"NSA Spying Showdown" Money Bomb right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28088229:26994663380:m:1:879035888:F6897D96BF0D7D4BCF9E53068589B23A:r)**.

| ****[** dpwillis67@gmail.com **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28088229:26994663380:m:1:879035888:F6897D96BF0D7D4BCF9E53068589B23A:r "https://secure.randpaul.com/?patriotact&sr=rhf052915t3")
**Contributed to NSA Spying Showdown Money Bomb?**
**## NO DONATION ##******
---

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28088230:26994663380:m:1:879035888:F6897D96BF0D7D4BCF9E53068589B23A:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28088231:26994663380:m:1:879035888:F6897D96BF0D7D4BCF9E53068589B23A:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28088232:26994663380:m:1:879035888:F6897D96BF0D7D4BCF9E53068589B23A:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28088233:26994663380:m:1:879035888:F6897D96BF0D7D4BCF9E53068589B23A:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28088229:26994663380:m:1:879035888:F6897D96BF0D7D4BCF9E53068589B23A:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28088229:26994663380:m:1:879035888:F6897D96BF0D7D4BCF9E53068589B23A:r)

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: thrilled
body:
Friend -

Over the last week, I've been thrilled by how many of you have joined me in standing up for Maryland's public schools. Your incredible response is just one sign of our growing grassroots strength - thank you for standing with me!

We're now just a few days away from our May end of month deadline. My team let me know that we're close to hitting a big milestone: 2,000 grassroots donations for our Grassroots Action Fund! **[Can you help us reach our goal and show that we are all in this together? Contribute now.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e56/70cdc2ba/47842084/3940070/4008272509/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-05eom?refcode=em052915&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+help+us+reach+our+goal+and+show+&utm_campaign=em052915&source=em052915")** [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e56/70cdc2ba/47842084/394000b/4008272509/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-05eom?refcode=em052915&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em052915&source=em052915") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $3 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e56/70cdc2ba/47842084/394001e/4008272509/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-05eom?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em052915_el&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Donate+3+instantly+gtgt&utm_campaign=em052915&source=em052915")** **[Donate $15 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e56/70cdc2ba/47842084/3940015/4008272509/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-05eom?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em052915_el&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Donate+15+instantly+gtgt&utm_campaign=em052915&source=em052915")** **[Donate $35 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e56/70cdc2ba/47842084/3940028/4008272509/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-05eom?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=em052915_el&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Donate+35+instantly+gtgt&utm_campaign=em052915&source=em052915")** **[Donate $50 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e56/70cdc2ba/47842084/3940020/4008272509/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-05eom?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em052915_el&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Donate+50+instantly+gtgt&utm_campaign=em052915&source=em052915")** **[Donate $100 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e56/70cdc2ba/47842084/3940037/4008272509/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-05eom?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em052915_el&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Donate+100+instantly+gtgt&utm_campaign=em052915&source=em052915")** **[Or, donate another amount.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e56/70cdc2ba/47842084/39400ca/4008272509/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-05eom?refcode=em052915&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em052915&source=em052915")** Our campaign is about making sure our country works for all of its citizens. That's why it's powered by people like you, who are ready to fight for that vision of America where a high-quality education, good paying jobs, and a strong middle class are within reach for everyone who works hard.

Together, we can make sure we're ready to fight back against right-wing dark money attacks. All eyes are on our campaign and our growing strength - can you help us keep growing by making a contribution ahead of Sunday's end of month deadline?

**[Every contribution will get us closer to our big goal.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e56/70cdc2ba/47842084/39400c0/4008272509/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-05eom?refcode=em052915&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=9+-+Every+contribution+will+get+us+closer+to&utm_campaign=em052915&source=em052915")**

Thanks,

Chris

---

Paid for Van Hollen for US Senate
---

body:

****
****
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI3MzkxMTQS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyODUyODM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
_**
**_
Peter,

Our finance director just told me you have not yet contributed towards our May fundraising goal. [Will you stand with us as we fight for smaller, more responsive government by becoming a Charter Member? ](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI3MzkxMTQS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyODUyODM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
**Blue:** [Contribute: $25 or more](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI3MzkxMTQS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyODUyODM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
**Red:** [Contribute $75 or more](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI3MzkxMTQS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyODUyODM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
**White:** [Contribute $150 or more](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI3MzkxMTQS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyODUyODM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
With only two days left in May, this is your last chance to contribute towards our May fundraising goal. It is essential we hit our monthly goal so we can be aggressive in our fight for the same big, bold reforms that I have been able to enact in Wisconsin.

[Will you consider becoming a Charter Member today?](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI3MzkxMTQS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyODUyODM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,
Scott Walker

__
__
______

[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI3MzkxMTQS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyODUyODM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

**

****
**

name: Mandi Karp, MurphyForFlorida.com
subject: When super PACs attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Outside groups are already trying to sway a potential Democratic primary. Friend -- **It's started**. Outside groups and super PACs are already attacking Patrick. The conservative Club for Growth just bought $250,000 in attack ads. You heard that right: A conservative super PAC is trying to sway a potential Democratic primary with a conservative-group-backed candidate. They're just getting started. It's why this month's deadline is more important than ever. **In order to hit our goal, we need 500 online donors to step up before Sunday's end-of-month deadline. Will you join us today?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida.
